app.title: EasyVoice
field.lang_info: Language the text will be read in — independent of voice; any voice can read any language
field.voice_info: Determines whose voice it sounds like; can be used across languages
field.text: Enter the text to read aloud
banner.cpu: 🐢 CPU mode — generation is slower, please be patient
voice.name: Voice name
voice.ref_text_info: The exact words spoken in the reference audio: correct text improves fidelity (ICL), but wrong/mismatched text causes garbled or overlong output. Leave blank if unsure (default mode).
preset.name: Preset name
guide.tts: **How to use:** ① Pick a voice (demos included; upload your own under 'My Voices') ② Type your text ③ Click Generate.
voice.hint: Upload or record ~10 seconds of clear speech to clone a voice.
style.title: Style
adv.title: Advanced
adv.hint: These all have sensible defaults — new users can skip this. Adjust only to fine-tune the voice.
adv.temperature_info: Higher = more varied and expressive but more random; lower = steadier and repeatable. Style already sets this — usually no need to change.
adv.top_p_info: Advanced sampling parameter — just leave the default (ignore if unsure).
adv.top_k_info: Advanced sampling parameter — just leave the default (ignore if unsure).
adv.rep_pen_info: If the voice repeats, stutters or stalls, raise it a bit (>1); otherwise keep 1.
adv.max_tokens_info: Default 2048; raise it if the end gets cut off or you want longer (up to ~87 min).
adv.tok_slow: slow to generate — split long text
adv.seed_info: 0 = random each time; a positive integer makes the same settings reproducible
guide.presets: **Presets** = saved Dub configurations. **Apply and save them on the Dub tab**; here you just tidy up: 🗑 delete unwanted ones (to rename, re-save on the Dub tab).
hero.trust: Runs locally · Free · Your voice never leaves this computer
preset.save_hint: Save the current Dub-tab settings (below) as a named preset for one-click reuse. Change them on the Dub tab.
field.text_ph: Type the text you want spoken…
voice.name_ph: Name this voice so you can pick it later…
err.need_text_voice: Please enter text and select a voice
err.need_ref_audio: Please upload or record reference audio (~10s of clear speech)
err.need_voice_rename: Select a voice and enter a new name
err.need_voice_pick: Select a voice to reorder first
voice.manage_hint: Rename with ✎ · ↑↓ reorder · 🗑 delete (new recordings go to the top)
voice.empty: No voices yet — add one on the left.
preset.empty: No presets yet. Set things up on the Dub tab and click Save as preset.
tab.subtitle: Subtitle Dub
sub.guide: **Upload subtitles** (SRT / VTT / LRC) → pick a voice → generate. **Each line is dubbed separately, then stitched into one track along the timeline**: every line aligns to its start time, overflow is gently sped up (≤1.5×) to fit, gaps stay silent. You also get an "adjusted subtitles" file.
err.need_subtitle: Please upload a subtitle file first
err.no_cues: No subtitles parsed — check the format (SRT / VTT / LRC)
